Reason_for_Visit.summary: Metastatic breast cancer, follow-up visit to review April 2021 PETCT scan results, discuss starting Doxil on 07/01/2021, and evaluate hip pain.

Clinical_Findings.findings: Numerous FDG avid hepatic metastases have increased in size and FDG uptake when compared to prior study performed on 01/17/2021. Numerous FDG avid skeletal metastases throughout the skeleton have increased in FDG uptake and number when compared to prior study performed on 01/17/2021. Focal region of apparent increased FDG uptake in the visualized portion of the right frontal lobe, incompletely characterized on this study, which could potentially be an intracranial metastasis. Prominent intraluminal uptake in the anorectal region, nonspecific, potentially physiologic or inflammatory in etiology. An underlying polyp would not be excluded.

Current_Medications.current_meds: ascorbic acid, cholecalciferol, magnesium, medical cannabis

Treatment_Changes.recent_changes: Patient not taking LORazepam, ondansetron, oxyCODONE, and prochlorperazine.

Treatment_Goals.current_meds: ascorbic acid, vitamin C, cholecalciferol, vitamin D3, LORazepam, magnesium, medical cannabis, ondansetron, oxyCODONE, prochlorperazine

Response_Assessment.response_assessment: Progression of metastatic disease on PET-CT scan, with numerous FDG avid hepatic and skeletal metastases increasing in size and FDG uptake compared to prior study.
Response_Assessment.current_meds: ascorbic acid, vitamin C, cholecalciferol, vitamin D3, LORazepam, magnesium, medical cannabis, ondansetron, oxyCODONE, prochlorperazine

Response_Assessment.review_of_systems: No fevers, chills, night sweats, loss of appetite or weight loss, no headaches, vision changes, mouth sores, no abdominal pain, nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, or bleeding, no dysuria or hematuria, no rash or bruising, no difficulty with speech, balance, or gait, no joint pain, no depression, or anxiety or trouble sleeping
Response_Assessment.physical_exam: General appearance - alert, well appearing, and in no distress, Mental status - alert, oriented to person, place, and time, Eyes - pupils equal and reactive, extraocular eye movements intact, Mouth - mucous membranes moist, pharynx normal without lesions, Poor dentition, Neck - supple, no significant adenopathy, Lymphatics - no palpable lymphadenopathy, Chest - clear to auscultation, no wheezes, rales or rhonchi, symmetric air entry, Heart - normal rate, regular rhythm, normal S1, S2, no murmurs, rubs, clicks or gallops, Abdomen - soft, nontender, nondistended, Liver edge 1 *****, Breasts - breasts appear normal, no suspicious masses, no skin or nipple changes or axillary nodes, Back exam - full range of motion, no tenderness, palpable spasm or pain on motion, Neurological - alert, oriented, normal speech, no focal findings or movement disorder noted, Musculoskeletal - no joint tenderness, deformity or swelling, Right chest wall port, Extremities - peripheral pulses normal, no pedal edema, no clubbing or cyanosis, Skin - normal coloration and turgor, no rashes, no suspicious skin lesions noted
